meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS pricing to Solve no design skills (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS pricing and overcome no design skills. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: SaaS Pricing to Solve No Design Skills
content.seo_description: Master SaaS pricing design without design skills. Use Antigravity and Claude Code to build professional pricing tables that convert clients instantly.
content.answer_block: Stop struggling with CSS layouts. By leveraging Antigravity to scaffold structured pricing components and Claude Code to handle responsive logic, you bypass manual design work. This workflow generates high-conversion, professional-grade SaaS pricing tables that look custom-built, allowing you to ship client projects in hours, not days.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a blank screen, a looming deadline, and a client who expects a world-class SaaS interface. But you aren't a designer, and the frustration of aligning divs and choosing color palettes is killing your velocity. The difference between a junior freelancer and a high-earning consultant isn't design talent—it's the ability to leverage AI-driven systems to output premium results.

Today, we stop fighting the pixel-pushing battle. We are deploying a modular, production-ready pricing architecture that converts. Using the raw power of Antigravity and Claude Code, we’ll turn your technical requirements into a polished, high-fidelity pricing module that makes you look like a full-stack design agency.

steps.title: Define the Pricing Logic
steps.description: Establish your tiers, feature sets, and conversion focus. This provides the blueprint for the AI to generate semantic, clean code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean, responsive SaaS pricing table data structure in JSON format with three tiers: Starter, Pro, and Enterprise, including feature lists and CTA labels.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create a pricing-data.json file based on the provided SaaS tiers'

steps.title: Scaffold the Component Structure
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate the boilerplate structure, ensuring accessibility and SEO-friendly HTML tags.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a modern, accessible React pricing component using Tailwind CSS. Focus on a clean, minimal aesthetic with a 'Most Popular' highlight on the Pro tier.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate a PricingTable.tsx component using Tailwind CSS classes'

steps.title: Inject Responsive Logic
steps.description: Ensure your pricing table scales perfectly from mobile to desktop using Claude Code's refinement capabilities.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Optimize the pricing component for mobile responsiveness. Stack cards vertically on mobile and horizontally on desktop.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'refine the PricingTable.tsx layout to be fully responsive using Tailwind breakpoints'

steps.title: Implement Conversion Triggers
steps.description: Add hover states and subtle animations to increase user engagement and click-through rates.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add subtle Framer Motion hover effects to the pricing cards and ensure the primary CTA button has a distinct, high-contrast style.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'integrate Framer Motion for hover animations on the pricing cards'

steps.title: Final Quality Assurance
steps.description: Use Claude Code to audit the codebase for performance bottlenecks and clean up any redundant CSS.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the current pricing component code for performance, accessibility (WCAG), and clean code practices.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'perform a code review and accessibility audit on PricingTable.tsx'

pro_tips: Always use 'design tokens' in your prompts to maintain brand consistency across different projects.
Ask the AI to generate 'ARIA labels' for every button to make your pricing tables accessible by default.
Instead of hardcoding prices, request a 'price-formatter' utility function to handle multi-currency logic.
Use Claude Code to generate unit tests for your pricing logic; clients love seeing proof of reliability.
When in doubt, prompt for 'Apple-style' minimalism—it hides lack of design skill better than complex layouts.
content.next_steps: Integrate your new pricing component into your main application route, connect it to your Stripe API, and deploy to Vercel to show your client the live progress.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting design friction stall your revenue. With these tools, you are no longer just a freelancer—you are a high-output AI architect. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
